headlines.title: Trump slams Senate's war powers vote on Iran as 'meaningless'
White House asks U.S. Congress for $87.6B, mostly to pay off Iran war
Trump signals he may pull out of trade agreement with Mexico and Canada
U.S. airline stocks rise as oil retreats to pre-Iran war levels
JP Morgan lowers Brent crude price forecast for second-half 2026

notes: U.S. equities closed mixed with S&P 500 and Nasdaq down modestly amid a tech sell-off, despite broader market participation.
Brent crude saw a significant drop towards $73/bbl as Middle East risk premiums continued to unwind following the U.S.-Iran agreement.
The US 10-year Treasury yield dropped to 4.406%, breaking key technical levels due to fading energy-driven inflation expectations.
